title: The Importance of Salah in Islam
author: Shuraim Kaweesi
content: Salah is the second pillar of Islam and the most important act of worship after the Shahada. Allah commands believers to establish prayer five times daily...

title: Why Ramadan is Special
author: Shuraim Kaweesi
content: Ramadan is the month in which the Quran was revealed. Muslims fast from dawn to sunset seeking the pleasure of Allah...
